svg.title: FLN Level Creation Pipeline
svg.desc: End-to-end pipeline from curriculum sources through AI level proposal, human review, and .md file generation

g.text: Source library (parsed once, embedded in every prompt)
Competency maps · Diagnostic Q banks (50/58/69 items) · Difficulty ratings · State coverage matrix · NCERT chapter order
Approved repo — used as few-shot examples
Shapes · Measurement · Money · Time · Data handling
Next gap in NIPUN/NCERT sequence · Difficulty score from diagnostic Q bank
State coverage matrix · Sub-level count rule (diff 1–3 = 1 sub, 4–6 = 2, 7+ = 3)
Title · Type · Concept · Description · Learning outcome · Skills
Main level body · Sub-levels with rationale · Section structure
Repo format · tone · one concept only
Draft shown in FLN Level Console
All fields editable inline · rationale visible · sub-level list with controls
Edit inline / add feedback / start over
Level N/ folder · metadata .md · N.0.md main · N.1.md … N.x.md sub-levels
Drop into GitHub repo → repeat for next level
